message:
test(cli): improve contract_status_populated_plain for CI without WezTerm

Remove the unused assert_no_secrets helper. Rework the populated
status contract test to handle environments where WezTerm is not
available — when the command fails, assert the stderr contains an
actionable diagnostic rather than hard-failing on missing pane
output. Also assert no panic occurs in either case.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
